title: Operations Engineer (SAP HCM)
description:
Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one personto formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.

EA Licence No: 20S0237

Roles and Responsibilities:
The Candidate shall manage all daily system integrations between other systems and e-HR and ensure data integrations are successful.
a. Track activities run concurrently on a daily basis, and each track needs to work with multiple parties including Subject Matter Expert, middleware, the interfacing counter-part and other candidates, to ensure end-to-end operability of the interfaces.
b. The Candidate shall manage all incoming and outgoing system interfaces. This includes external interfaces, external projects, eServices, and applications on Internet portals and Commercial Cloud.
c. The Candidate shall provide daily operations support in terms of batch job monitoring and error resolution.
d. The Candidate shall provide inputs for the development and deployment of CRs related to interfaces, such as during requirements gathering and UAT.
e. The Candidate shall profile and analyse data for issues and discrepancies using software tools (such as Microsoft office tools, SAP programs/queries or SQL) when required.
f. The Candidate shall provide analysis and consultation services to systems to address operational issues and advise on resolutions to data-related issues.
g. The Candidate shall coordinate with the data owner, for HR data where man-in-the-loop decision is required.
h. The Candidate shall monitor error logs and ensure timely resolution of interface errors.
i. The Candidate shall coordinate and perform secretariat role for meetings with different stakeholders and internal meetings. The Candidate shall generate reports to management, various forums and prepare slides for presentations during meetings when required.
j. The Candidate shall maintain project resource assignments, track status and initiate appropriate actions in response to deviations from plan to keep the project on-track.
k. The Candidate shall perform data uploads for manual data transfers where required.
l. The Candidate shall review, propose and update changes to the documentation where necessary.


Education Qualification
At least a Diploma/Degree in Computer Science, Information System, Science, Engineering or Equivalent.

Required Competencies
a. Good knowledge of information technology, especially in the areas of SAP HCM ERP or HCM SaaS.
b. Good understanding of the data design in SAP HCM ERP or HCM SaaS.
c. Demonstrated competency in investigating and identifying causes of issues, and able to propose solutions to rectify the issue.
d. Proficiency in SQL programming is preferred.
e. Competent in applying Microsoft Excel functions.
f. Good planning and coordination skills.
g. Strong writing, verbal communication and presentation skills.
h. Good team player, responsible and conscientious.
i. Resourceful, independent, responsive and pro-active.

Required Working Experience
a. At least 2 years of working experience in information technology.
b. Experience in SAP HCM ERP is preferred.
c. Experience in operation support including end user support, troubleshooting and testing is preferred.
d. SQL working experience and competent in SQL Programming is preferred.
